label: Energy Overview — Diesel Generator Example
info: Demonstrates adding a custom Diesel Generator entity to the Energy Overview widget by supplying a customPaths JSON block with six entities (the five defaults plus a generator source).

name: Diesel Generator Custom Entity Example
info:
This flow demonstrates how to add a custom entity (a Diesel Generator) to the Energy Overview widget.

The ui-energy-overview node's **Custom Paths** field contains a full entity declaration (replace semantics):
- Five default entities (solar, home, grid, battery, car) reusing default geometry
- One custom entity: **generator** (direction: source) placed in the bottom-right area

The `generatorToInverter` route key is derived automatically from the entity name.

**How to use:**
1. Click "Generator Running" to start the diesel generator flow
2. Click "Generator Stopped" to stop the generator
3. Click "Solar + Home (defaults)" to verify the five default entities still animate
4. Click "Stop All" to clear all flows

**Custom Paths JSON structure:**
```json
{
  "entities": { ... },
  "energyPaths": { ... },
  "labels": { ... }
}
```

name: Energy Overview (Generator)
customPaths: {"entities":{"solar":{"direction":"source"},"home":{"direction":"sink"},"grid":{"direction":"both"},"battery":{"direction":"both"},"car":{"direction":"both"},"generator":{"direction":"source"}},"energyPaths":{"solarToInverter":"M 427 295 L 484 332 L 484 533","inverterToHome":["M 513 532 L 513 445 L 808 451 L 810 549","M 513 532 L 513 445 L 966 455"],"inverterToGrid":"M 451 631 L 401 631 L 403 821 L 449 848","inverterToBattery":"M 499 649 L 499 748 L 594 742","inverterToCar":"M 451 604 L 389 608 L 253 599 L 253 654","generatorToInverter":"M 513 649 L 760 700 L 880 800"},"labels":{"solar":{"position":"M 608 41 L 608 300","align":"top","text":"SOLAR"},"home":{"position":"M 776 41 L 776 445","align":"top","text":"HOME"},"grid":{"position":"M 448 850 L 448 921","align":"bottom","text":"GRID"},"battery":{"position":"M 643 772 L 643 921","align":"bottom","text":"BATTERY"},"car":{"position":"M 103 820 L 103 921","align":"bottom","text":"CAR"},"generator":{"position":"M 880 810 L 880 921","align":"bottom","text":"GENERATOR"}}}
